member.name: T:Discord.Webhook.Colors
member.summary: List of pre-defined colors to use when building an embed

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.Colors.Red
member.summary: Represents the RGB color '231, 76, 70' or HEX color '#e74c3c'

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.Colors.DarkRed
member.summary: Represents the RGB color '153, 45, 34' or HEX color '#992d22'

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.Colors.Purple
member.summary: Represents the RGB color '155, 89, 182' or HEX color '#9b59b6'

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.Colors.Green
member.summary: Represents the RGB color '46, 204, 113' or HEX color '#2ecc71'

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.Colors.Orange
member.summary: Represents the RGB color '230, 126, 34' or HEX color '#e67e22'

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.Colors.Grey
member.summary: Represents the RGB color '179, 177, 175' or HEX color '#b3b1af'

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.Colors.Blue
member.summary: Represents the RGB color '32, 102, 148' or HEX color '#206694'

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.Colors.LightBlue
member.summary: Represents the RGB color '135, 206, 250' or HEX color '#87cefa'

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.Colors.Yellow
member.summary: Represents the RGB color '255, 255, 0' or HEX color '#ffff00'

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.Colors.Violet
member.summary: Represents the RGB color '64, 224, 208' or HEX color '#ee82ee'

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.Colors.Brown
member.summary: Represents the RGB color '160, 82, 45' or HEX color '#a0522d'

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.Colors.Magenta
member.summary: Represents the RGB color '255, 0, 255' or HEX color '#ff00ff'

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.Colors.Black
member.summary: Represents the RGB color '0, 0, 0' or HEX color '#ffffff'

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.Colors.White
member.summary: Represents the RGB color '255, 255, 255' or HEX color '#000000'

member.name: T:Discord.Webhook.EmbedBuilder
member.summary: The embed builder class, this allows easy tooling to build embeds using the Fluent design pattern

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.EmbedBuilder.AddField(System.String,System.Object,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a field to the embed
member.param: The title of the field
The content in the field
Whether to inline the field

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.EmbedBuilder.WithColor(Discord.Webhook.DColor)
member.summary: Sets color of the embed
member.param: The to set the embed to

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.EmbedBuilder.WithTitle(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the title of the embed
member.param: The title to set on the embed

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.EmbedBuilder.WithAuthor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets the author field of the embed
member.param: The name of the author
The URL pointing to the icon of the author

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.EmbedBuilder.WithDescription(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the description of the embed
member.param: The description to set on the embed

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.EmbedBuilder.WithImage(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the URL pointing to the image to show on the embed
member.param: The URL pointing to the image to put on the embed

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.EmbedBuilder.WithThumbnail(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the thumbnail image URL, the URL should point to the image that you want to use
member.param: The URL of the thumbnail

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.EmbedBuilder.WithFooter(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Set the footer of the embed
member.param: The text to set on the footer
The icon URL to set beside the text on the footer

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.EmbedBuilder.WithUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the URL of the embed, this appears on the embed title as a hyperlink to the set URL
member.param: The URL to set on the embed

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.EmbedBuilder.WithVideo(Discord.Webhook.Video)
member.summary: Sets a video on the embed using a
member.param: The which represents the media to show on the embed

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.EmbedBuilder.WithVideo(System.String)
member.summary: Sets a video on the embed using a URL
member.param: The URL which points to the video to show

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.EmbedBuilder.WithProvider(Discord.Webhook.Provider)
member.summary: Sets provider to the embed
member.param: The provider to set on the embed

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.EmbedBuilder.AddFieldsRange(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Discord.Webhook.Field})
member.summary: Adds a collection of fields to the embed
member.param: The new fields to add to the embed

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.EmbedBuilder.Build
member.summary: Builds the and converts it to a

member.name: T:Discord.Webhook.Exceptions.DiscordWebhookException
member.summary: Thrown when webhook execution fails, the message contains the actual error thrown by Discord

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.Exceptions.DiscordWebhookException.#ctor(Discord.Webhook.Models.DiscordError)
member.summary: Constructs a
member.param: The error thrown by Discord

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.Exceptions.DiscordWebhookException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Constructs a
member.param: The fallback string message

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.Extensions.ToDColor(System.Drawing.Color)
member.summary: Converts a to a to be used in an embed
member.param: The color to convert

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.Extensions.ValidateWebhookUsername(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that a username passes the Discord validation standards
member.param: The username to validate

member.name: T:Discord.Webhook.Models.DiscordError
member.summary: Represents an error thrown by Discord

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.Models.DiscordError.code
member.summary: The error code thrown by Discord

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.Models.DiscordError.message
member.summary: The (hopefully) friendly message detailing as to why the request failed

member.name: T:Discord.Webhook.JsonSerializer`1
member.summary: The main JSON serializer for the library
member.typeparam: The type to be serializing the responses to

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.JsonSerializer`1.Serialize(`0)
member.summary: Serializes an object to JSON

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.JsonSerializer`1.Deserialize(System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes an object from JSON

member.name: T:Discord.Webhook.Webhook
member.summary: The class that handles sending requests to the Discord webhook

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.Webhook.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Constructs a new Discord webhook object
member.exception: Thrown when one of the arguments provided does not match validation rules set at Discord's end, for example the username cannot contain 'Discord'.
member.param: The Discord webhook URL
The username the webhook will send with, if its null defaults to what was assigned in the webhook menu on Discord
The URL that points to the avatar image the webhook will use, if its null defaults to what was assigned in the webhook menu on Discord
The name of the thread to put the webhook message in

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.Webhook.SendAsync(System.String,Discord.Webhook.WebhookObject,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Constructs a new Discord webhook object and immediately sends the request, useful for one-time webhook requests
member.exception: Thrown when Discord returns an error, the message contains the details
Thrown when one of the arguments provided does not match validation rules set at Discord's end, for example the username cannot contain 'Discord'.
member.param: The Discord webhook URL
The webhook object to send to the webhook URL
The username the webhook will send with, if its null defaults to what was assigned in the webhook menu on Discord
The URL that points to the avatar image the webhook will use, if its null defaults to what was assigned in the webhook menu on Discord
The name of the thread to put the webhook message in

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.Webhook.ExecuteAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpContent,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the Discord webhook request
member.param: The content to send to Discord
The cancellation token
member.exception: Thrown when Discord returns an error, the message contains the details

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.Webhook.SetMessageArguments(Discord.Webhook.WebhookObject)
member.summary: Sets the message arguments for a , this includes the username, avatar URL and thread name
member.param: The webhook object to set the arguments for

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.Webhook.GetMessageBody(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the message body for a simple text-based message (no embeds)
member.param: The message content to set

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.Webhook.Send(System.String)
member.summary: Sends a message to the Discord webhook synchronously
member.exception: Thrown when Discord returns an error, the message contains the details
member.param: The string message to send to the webhook

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.Webhook.Send(Discord.Webhook.WebhookObject)
member.summary: Sends a webhook object to the Discord webhook synchronously
member.exception: Thrown when Discord returns an error, the message contains the details
member.param: The object to send to the webhook

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.Webhook.Delete
member.summary: Deletes the webhook

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.Webhook.SendAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a message to the Discord webhook asynchronously
member.param: The string message to send to the webhook
The cancellation token
member.exception: Thrown when Discord returns an error, the message contains the details
member.returns: A representing the status of the operation

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.Webhook.SendAsync(Discord.Webhook.WebhookObject,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a webhook object to the Discord webhook asynchronously
member.param: The object to send to the webhook
The cancellation token
member.exception: Thrown when Discord returns an error, the message contains the details
member.returns: A representing the status of the operation

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.Webhook.DeleteAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes the webhook asynchronously
member.param: The cancellation token
member.returns: A representing the status of the operation

member.name: T:Discord.Webhook.WebhookObject
member.summary: The webhook message object, allows you to set plaintext messages, images or embeds

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.WebhookObject.#ctor
member.summary: Just a basic constructor

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.WebhookObject.content
member.summary: The message of the embed

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.WebhookObject.username
member.summary: the username you shouldn't be able to see this

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.WebhookObject.avatar_url
member.summary: the avatar_url you shouldn't be able to see this

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.WebhookObject.thread_name
member.summary: The name of thread to create (requires the webhook channel to be a forum channel)

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.WebhookObject.tts
member.summary: will the content be read out

member.name: F:Discord.Webhook.WebhookObject.embeds
member.summary: the embeds to send with the webhook there is a max of 25

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.WebhookObject.ToString
member.summary: converts the to JSON for posting to the URL

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.WebhookObject.AddEmbed(Discord.Webhook.EmbedBuilder)
member.summary: Adds an embed using the
member.param: The builder to use when adding the embed
member.returns: The updated with the new embed

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.WebhookObject.AddEmbed(Discord.Webhook.Embed)
member.summary: Adds an embed
member.param: The embed to add to the collection
member.returns: The updated with the new embed

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.WebhookObject.AddEmbed(System.Action{Discord.Webhook.EmbedBuilder})
member.summary: Adds an embed using the with an
member.param: The builder to use when adding the embed

member.summary: the message in the embed

member.summary: the url the title links to

member.summary: the color of the embed

member.summary: the footer of the embed

member.summary: the image the embed will have

member.summary: the thumbnail of the embed

member.summary: any videos the embed will play

member.summary: the provider of the embed

member.summary: the author of the embed

member.summary: the fields the embed can have capped at 25

member.summary: the content of the field

member.summary: the proxy_url to the image dont ask me its in the docs (a proxied url of the image)

member.summary: the height in pixels the image will be

member.summary: the width in pixels the image will be

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.DColor.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new color to send to discord The reason it is not System.Drawing.Color is to ensure compat with the color in the media and to support more people heading forward
member.param: The 8-bit integer representing the red value
The 8-bit integer representing the green value
The 8-bit integer representing the blue value

member.name: M:Discord.Webhook.DColor.#ctor(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte)
member.summary: Creates a new color to send to discord The reason it is not System.Drawing.Color is to ensure compat with the color in the media and to support more people heading forward
member.param: The 8-bit integer representing the red value
The 8-bit integer representing the green value
The 8-bit integer representing the blue value
